name: obsidian-kb
description: Knowledge-base toolkit: harvests repo metadata into a markdown+SQLite vault with Obsidian and Astro board viewers. Requires Python 3.13+ and Node 24+.

plugins.name: obsidian-kb
plugins.description: Knowledge-base toolkit for Claude Code: kb-sync, kb-status, reconciler, and optional Obsidian + Astro board viewers.
